summary: Post-visual-overhaul regression validation of The CA Grid — Phase 1. Verified backend is UNCHANGED (14/15 pytest tests pass, same result as iteration 1 — the single pre-existing failure is the /api/openapi.json 404 documented in iteration_1). Frontend visual overhaul preserved ALL Phase 1 functionality end-to-end: landing hero + live ticker (fonts confirmed: Instrument Serif on headings, Space Grotesk on body, JetBrains Mono loaded), split-screen /login with inline login-error on wrong password, /signup redirect to /onboarding, Aspiring branch shows one-question quiz that auto-advances (~320ms), 5 answers reveal fit-score-card (score animates to 100/100 for a positive answer set), Foundation branch skips quiz and jumps to goal+subjects, onb-finish POSTs /api/onboarding and /api/auth/me confirms persistence (onboarded=true, journey_level=Foundation, subjects=[Accounting], daily_goal_minutes=180, fit_score=None for non-Aspiring), confetti fires and /dashboard renders with editorial serif 'Welcome back, {name}.' plus level/goal/streak cards + phase2-placeholder + full topnav (streak-flame, user-avatar-trigger) and violet-bar sidebar (dashboard/focus/analytics/profile). sidebar-focus -> /coming-soon?f=focus renders coming-soon-card with a working back-to-dashboard. Avatar dropdown menu-logout clears session and visiting /dashboard bounces to /login. No console errors of concern; the two 401s at load are the expected /api/auth/me probes for unauthenticated visitors.

minor.issue: PRE-EXISTING from iteration 1 (backend was NOT changed in this iteration). FastAPI still mounts openapi at root /openapi.json which is caught by the frontend ingress. Fix: FastAPI(openapi_url='/api/openapi.json', docs_url='/api/docs', redoc_url='/api/redoc').

action_items: (carried over from iteration 1, backend untouched) Expose OpenAPI under /api by setting FastAPI(openapi_url='/api/openapi.json'). Not a regression from the visual overhaul.
critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding.jsx is 564 lines — near the 700-line ceiling. As Phase 2 lands (focus timer step, mentor step) split into steps/*.jsx or use a reducer + step registry.

Custom cursor + noise overlay + cursor-reactive grid are heavy DOM listeners on every mousemove. They correctly opt out on touch/reduced-motion, but consider requestAnimationFrame throttling in CustomCursor for low-power devices.
Confetti canvas mount on Dashboard fires on every fresh onboarding — good. Confirm listener cleanup on unmount (dashboard route change) to avoid retained canvas contexts.
AuthContext.checkAuth still swallows all errors (from iteration 1). Distinguish 401 (expected, unauthenticated) from network failure so the UI can show a retry banner.
Backend server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event startup/shutdown and get_current_user is not wired via Depends. Not blocking Phase 1, revisit in Phase 2.
test_credentials: demo@cagrid.in / demo123 (seeded via POST /api/seed on backend startup)
seed_data_creation: Fresh e2e users during frontend run: asp_<ts>@cagrid.in (Aspiring path w/ quiz), fnd_<ts>@cagrid.in (Foundation path skip quiz). Not cleaned up (no delete API).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual overhaul is functionally clean — all data-testids preserved from iteration 1 and all navigation flows still work. Notable frontend details verified: (1) fit-score-card shows a counter that reaches the computed score (100 for the all-first-option answer set) plus a roadmap block; (2) onb-goal-slider is a controlled React <input type=range>, so tests that want to change the value should use page.locator().evaluate to dispatch React-friendly change events or better yet drag/keydown — direct el.value=240 will not stick; (3) Foundation subjects are ['Accounting','Business Laws','Statistics','Economics'] giving onb-subject-accounting; Aspiring subjects are ['Accounting basics',...] giving onb-subject-accounting-basics — pick the right one per level; (4) Custom cursor uses pointer-events:none so clicks pass through cleanly with force=True; (5) 2 401s in console on landing come from AuthContext probing /api/auth/me — expected, not an issue.
rca of the issue: N/A — no new regressions found. The lone failing test (openapi_public) is inherited from iteration 1 and its RCA (FastAPI default openapi_url served at root, ingress routes non-/api paths to React) is unchanged since server.py was not modified.
